critic_raw:
Issue 1: Objective changed between policies — incumbent on renewal probability, challenger evaluated on net contribution margin. Non-symmetric comparison.
Issue 2: DR nuisance models fit on full four-quarter log including Q3-Q4. Not a holdout evaluation on the reporting period.
Issue 3: Operating cutoff selected to maximize margin on Q3-Q4 and then reported on Q3-Q4 — circular threshold selection.
Issue 4: Challenger received three rounds of Bayesian hyperparameter search; incumbent is on 18-month-old original calibration — asymmetric optimization.
defender_raw: Issue 1: Concede structurally. The incumbent should be re-optimized on margin for a fair comparison. Issue 2: Partial rebuttal — randomized assignment provides causal identification; using more data for nuisance models is standard practice. However, a pre-reporting nuisance fit is cleaner. Issue 3: Concede. Issue 4: Concede. Three of four issues require a clean rerun.
adjudication_raw:
Round 1: Critic raises 4 issues. Defender concedes Issues 1, 3, 4 and partially rebuts Issue 2. Points resolved after Round 1: Issues 1, 3, 4. Open: Issue 2.

Round 2: Issue 2 — both sides agree pre-reporting nuisance fitting is better practice. Resolved as empirical_test_required.

Final verdict: empirical_test_agreed. All 4 resolved, 1 force-resolved in Round 2.
all_issues_raised: Issue 1: objective changed from renewal probability to net contribution margin
Issue 2: DR nuisance models fit on full log including Q3-Q4 reporting period
Issue 3: operating cutoff selected on Q3-Q4 used for headline reporting
Issue 4: asymmetric Bayesian tuning for challenger vs frozen incumbent

empirical_test.condition: Refit nuisance models excluding reporting slice, preselect threshold, re-calibrate incumbent on margin, evaluate both on frozen holdout
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Challenger lift falls below zero or CI includes zero on clean holdout protocol
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Challenger beats re-optimized incumbent by at least 3% incremental profit with block-aware 95% CI excluding zero
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Positive but sub-3% lift or heterogeneous regional results
